note: Official source marks 'Усім.' correct (option text-matches our index 1). Controller's gesture applies to all vehicles regardless of color; explanation: right arm extended forward, non-rail vehicles from left allowed all directions. Confirmed by pdr.infotech.gov.ua/novi-testy-pdr/ticket/4041 having identical 5-option set. Our stored current_answer=2 ('Червоному і жовтому.') is wrong; alt_read=1 matches.
